title: HPV high-risk genotype time-series in Xi'an, China (2021-2025): analysis code and reproducibility archive
description:
Analysis code and aggregate outputs for a 5-year retrospective single-centre cohort analysis of 18,185 women undergoing cervical HPV genotyping at Norinco General Hospital, Xi'an, China, between 5 January 2021 and 31 December 2025.

Statistical methods: Wilson 95% CI; log-linear AAPC with 1500-replicate binomial bootstrap; pandemic vs post-pandemic Prevalence Ratio with log-PR Wald CI; direct age standardisation (12 5-year strata); Mann-Kendall; Cochran-Armitage; joinpoint regression (exploratory); external age-standardisation to the WHO World Standard Population; harmonic seasonal Poisson/negative-binomial GLM.

Outputs: 16-sheet results workbook (Excel) + 7 publication-quality figures (incl. a 3-panel methodology-upgrade figure).

Associated manuscript: Wu et al., 'Shifting oncogenic HPV ecology after COVID-19: emergence of HPV-51 and decoupling of HPV-16 in a cervical-cancer screening cohort in Xi'an, China (2021–2025)'. Under peer review; DOI to be added upon publication.

Ethics: Norinco General Hospital IRB approval No. 202601271338000343089 (project code 26z03, 27 January 2026). Raw individual-level patient data are not included due to patient privacy and institutional data-governance regulations; aggregated outputs are fully provided.

Funding: Scientific Research Project of Xi'an Medical College (Grant No. 26z03).

notes: Funded by the Xi'an Medical College Scientific Research Project (Grant No. 26z03). Reproducibility archive accompanying the manuscript under peer review. v1.0.5: adds three methodology-upgrade analyses (external WHO age-standardisation, harmonic seasonal GLM, monthly joinpoint) via code/methodology_upgrade.py, figures/FigS6_methodology_upgrade, and Supplementary Tables S9 and S10; manuscript/supplement refreshed (38 references; RECORD+GATHER reporting). Primary numerical results unchanged; canonical_aapc_table.json byte-identical since v1.0.0.
